steps.title: Set up the cost expression for each item
steps.content: Since forks cost \$0.04 each and we're buying x forks, the fork cost is \$0.04x. Since plates cost \$0.48 each and we're buying y plates, the plate cost is \$0.48y.

steps.title: Combine the costs and set equal to the total
steps.content:
The total cost is the sum of both expenses:
$$0.04x + 0.48y = 661.76$$
That matches choice D — D is correct.
